title: Horrorimining
description: A horror modpack that overhauls the vanilla game to be scarier & more difficult - mobs are more dangerous, nights are unrelenting, theirs terrifying monsters lurking behind the fog, in the depths of caves - waiting for you...
body:
### Introduction

A horror modpack that overhauls the vanilla game to be scarier & more difficult - mobs are more dangerous, nights are unrelenting, theirs terrifying monsters lurking behind the fog, in the depths of caves - waiting for you... & myserties to unravel

### Mods

Performance: Uses the 'Optimalsation/Optimax' modpack as a baseline which is the fastest performing modpack avalible for Minecraft!

QoL: Mods that make minecraft more user friendly, accessible and enjoyable like more intuitive keybinds, mouse handling, & much more

Exploration: Mods that tweak existing terrain, biomes, etc - along with mods that add new structures to the game. This makes exploration way more interesting

Mobs: 1) Mobs are now stronger, with either special effects or dealing more damage! 
2) A entity that lurks just behind the fog, stalking you... haunting your world with random mysterious changes. Even if you don't see him, he will always have his eye on you... 
3) A very powerful creature lurks in depths of caves, they're fast and powerful, do not engage. Mining is extremely dangerous, always be on alert! Your life depends on it

### Full vs Lite

- Expanded: Includes more mods making the game less vanilla-friendly, & is also less performance

- Lite: Closer to vanilla Minecraft & more peformance friendly

### Recommendations

- Keep your render distance low (4-8 chunks) so seeing off in the distance is harder, making the fog denser and adding a sense of mystery

- Enable all the resource packs the mod comes with and the HorrorBSL shader

### Disclaimer

I include my own "Options.txt" file in order to ensure the resource packs are applied by default and in the correct order. However this file also copies all my other settings from FOV, keybinds, sensitivity, etc, so be sure to tweak things to your own preference because some of them will be different from vanilla
